info.title: Raven TUI RPC
info.description: JSON-RPC 2.0 contract between the Raven Python parent process (RpcServer) and the Node TUI child process (RpcClient). Single source of truth for both sides. Pydantic v2 models in raven/tui_rpc/models.py and codegen-derived TypeScript types in ui-tui/src/rpc/generated.ts must stay in sync with this file. Drift is caught in CI by tests/test_rpc_schema_match.py and `npm run lint:rpc`.

methods.name: session.list
methods.summary: List tui-channel sessions sorted by updated_at descending.

methods.name: session.get
methods.summary: Get a single session by session_key.

methods.name: session.create
methods.summary: Create a new session given a channel + chat_id.

methods.name: session.resume
methods.summary: Resume a session, returning recent messages.

methods.name: session.delete
methods.summary: Delete a session file and invalidate its cache entry.

schema.description: Full session_key as sent by the UI.

deleted.description: The session_id that was deleted (matches the request param); null when no such session file existed.

methods.name: session.most_recent
methods.summary: Return the most-recently-updated tui session key.

session_id.description: Full tui:<chat_id> key; absent/null when no sessions exist.

methods.name: session.title
methods.summary: Get or set the title of a session.

schema.description: When present, set as the new title; when absent, return the current title.

pending.description: True when the title is held in memory for a lazy (never-saved) session and lands with the session's first save.

methods.name: session.clear
methods.summary: Wipe a session's messages in place, keeping the same session_id.

session_id.description: The same session_key (no new id minted).

cleared.description: True when the in-place wipe ran.

methods.name: session.undo
methods.summary: Drop the last n turns of a session (default 1).

methods.name: session.export
methods.summary: Render a session transcript to a Markdown file and return its path.

schema.description: Session id / prefix / full key to export; current session when omitted.

exported.description: True when a Markdown file was written.

path.description: Absolute path of the written file, or null on failure.

reason.description: Failure reason when not exported: not_found | ambiguous | write_failed.

candidates.description: Candidate full keys when reason is ambiguous.

methods.name: session.history
methods.summary: Paginated message history for a session.
methods.description: Routed via cli.dispatch at runtime in v0.1 (see design.md §3 D7). Runtime routes through cli.dispatch(argv=['sessions', 'history', '<session_key>'], width=W).

schema.description: Maximum number of messages to return; default 500 to match Session.get_history.
Return messages with index < before_index. Used for pagination.

methods.name: turn.send
methods.summary: Send a user message to a session and start a turn.

methods.name: turn.subscribe
methods.summary: Subscribe to streaming TurnEvent notifications for a session.

methods.name: turn.unsubscribe
methods.summary: Stop receiving notifications; turn itself continues.

methods.name: turn.cancel
methods.summary: Abort the current turn (calls AgentLoop.stop()).

methods.name: mcp.list
methods.summary: List MCP servers.
methods.description: Routed via cli.dispatch at runtime in v0.1 (see design.md §3 D7). Runtime routes through cli.dispatch(argv=['mcp', 'list'], width=W).

methods.name: mcp.test
methods.summary: Test connectivity to a single MCP server (handshake probe).
methods.description: Routed via cli.dispatch at runtime in v0.1 (see design.md §3 D7). Runtime routes through cli.dispatch(argv=['mcp', 'test', '<server_name>'], width=W).

methods.name: mcp.tools
methods.summary: List tools exposed by an MCP server.
methods.description: Routed via cli.dispatch at runtime in v0.1 (see design.md §3 D7). Runtime routes through cli.dispatch(argv=['mcp', 'tools', '<server_name>'], width=W).

methods.name: skill.list
methods.summary: List skills.
methods.description: Routed via cli.dispatch at runtime in v0.1 (see design.md §3 D7). Runtime routes through cli.dispatch(argv=['skill', 'list'], width=W).

methods.name: skill.pin
methods.summary: Pin a skill (write action; structured handler).

methods.name: skill.unpin
methods.summary: Unpin a skill.

methods.name: model.options
methods.summary: List providers, their curated models, and the current selection.

methods.name: model.save_key
methods.summary: Store an API key (and optional api_base) for a provider.

methods.name: model.disconnect
methods.summary: Clear a provider's stored credentials.

methods.name: model.add_model
methods.summary: Append a model id to a provider's curated picker list.

methods.name: model.remove_model
methods.summary: Remove a model id from a provider's curated picker list.

methods.name: config.get
methods.summary: Read hot-changeable config fields (whitelist).

schema.description: If omitted, return all whitelisted fields. Unknown keys are silently dropped.

methods.name: config.set
methods.summary: Set a hot-changeable config field.

methods.name: system.hello
methods.summary: Initial handshake (must be the first RPC call from client).

methods.name: system.ping
methods.summary: Liveness probe.

methods.name: system.version
methods.summary: Report server / schema / package versions.

schema_version.description: OpenRPC info.version mirrored back to client.

methods.name: cli.dispatch
methods.summary: Dispatch an Raven CLI command in-process, capture rich-rendered output.
methods.description: D7 mixed-mode main channel: read-only CLI commands route through cli.dispatch and reuse the Typer CLI's Rich rendering. width is contract-required (client measures Ink container, server cannot guess). See design.md §3 D7.

schema.description: Pre-tokenized argv (TUI side has already shlex-split).
Ink container width in cells; required for Rich Console wrapping.
Override the default 30s timeout for long-running commands.

methods.name: setup.status
methods.summary: Report whether an LLM provider is configured (hermes startup hook).
methods.description: Called by hermes UI useSessionLifecycle.ts / setupHandoff.ts at startup. v0.1 reads ~/.raven/config.json; if read fails, returns provider_configured=true as fallback (see design.md §3a.1).

methods.name: reload.mcp
methods.summary: No-op in v0.1 (hermes polls every 5s).
methods.description: MUST NOT throw. hermes UI useConfigSync.ts:202 polls every 5s; throwing would spam logs. v0.1 implementation returns {ok: true} unconditionally. See design.md §3a.2.

methods.name: commands.catalog
methods.summary: Dynamic CLI command catalog reflected from the Typer app (replaces v0.0.2 -32012 stub).
methods.description: Reflects raven.cli.commands.app to build a slash-command catalog consumed by ui-tui's alias / prefix-1-match / multi-match-ambiguous logic in createSlashHandler.ts. Filters out _DISPATCH_BLACKLIST entries (gateway / provider login / channels login / sandbox shell / tui / onboard) and agent-without-message. See harness-command-catalog-dynamic design.md §D1-D2.

methods.name: voice.toggle
methods.summary: hermes-only stub: voice not supported in Raven v0.1.

methods.name: browser.manage
methods.summary: hermes-only stub: browser automation not supported.

methods.name: spawn_tree.save
methods.summary: hermes-only stub: spawn_tree topology not supported.

methods.name: spawn_tree.list
methods.summary: hermes-only stub: spawn_tree topology not supported.

methods.name: spawn_tree.load
methods.summary: hermes-only stub: spawn_tree topology not supported.

methods.name: process.stop
methods.summary: hermes-only stub: use Ctrl+C instead.

methods.name: rollback.list
methods.summary: hermes-only stub: filesystem rollback not supported; use git.

methods.name: rollback.diff
methods.summary: hermes-only stub: filesystem rollback not supported.

methods.name: rollback.restore
methods.summary: hermes-only stub: filesystem rollback not supported.

methods.name: tools.configure
methods.summary: hermes-only stub: edit config.json directly.

JsonValue.description: Recursive JSON value type. Implemented as an unconstrained object in JSON Schema; downstream Pydantic uses typing.Any.

SessionListItem.description: One row in the TUI session picker (gatewayTypes.ts SessionListItem).

parameters.description: JSON Schema for the tool's input arguments.

stdout.description: Rich-rendered output with ANSI SGR sequences.

stderr.description: Error / warning output with ANSI SGR sequences.

error_code.description: Only present for timeout / not-dispatch-compatible cases (mirrors a JSON-RPC error code).

error.description: Human-readable explanation of why this method is not supported in v0.1.

hint.description: Optional hint to the user (e.g., 'Press Ctrl+C').

canon.description: alias (with leading /) -> canonical mapping. v0.1: alias = canonical 1:1 (no short aliases generated; TS-side prefix-1-match handles partials). Group + subcommand are space-separated (e.g. '/channels status'), not slash- or dot-separated.

pairs.description: Ordered (alias, canonical) tuples. TS-side createGatewayEventHandler.ts:198 gates on non-empty pairs; empty pairs degrades to slash.exec direct dispatch.

sub.description: group -> [subcommand]. Blacklisted entries (e.g. channels login) and agent-REPL are filtered out.

categories.description: Ordered category list: '(top-level)' first then alphabetical group names. Fully filtered groups (e.g. tui) do not appear.

skill_count.description: Total skill count from skill_forge store SQL count; 0 if DB missing (warning field then populated).

warning.description: Optional warning pushed to TUI activity strip (e.g. 'skill store not initialized').

TurnEvent.description: Discriminated union of turn streaming events. The 'type' field is the discriminator.
